items.summary: 早晚刷牙，牙齿白白，不会长虫子牙。
items.image_prompt: Realistic photo of a child brushing teeth in front of a bathroom mirror, toothbrush and toothpaste, bright natural lighting, no text, no watermark

items.summary: 吃饭前、上厕所后要洗手，洗掉细菌不生病。
items.image_prompt: Realistic photo of a child washing hands with soap under running water, bubbles and clean sink, natural lighting, no text, no watermark

items.summary: 多喝白开水，身体不缺水，皮肤也更好。
items.image_prompt: Realistic photo of a child drinking water from a glass, bright kitchen background, natural lighting, no text, no watermark

items.summary: 不挑食，细嚼慢咽，不浪费粮食。
items.image_prompt: Realistic photo of a child eating a balanced meal with rice and vegetables at a table, natural lighting, no text, no watermark

items.summary: 晚上早点睡，白天才有精神玩和学习。
items.image_prompt: Realistic photo of a child sleeping peacefully in a cozy bed with soft blanket and pillow, warm night light, no text, no watermark

items.summary: 每天跑跑步、跳跳绳，身体棒棒的。
items.image_prompt: Realistic photo of children playing and running outdoors on a grassy playground, sunny day, natural lighting, no text, no watermark

items.summary: 打喷嚏捂住嘴，病菌不会传给别人。
items.image_prompt: Realistic photo of a child covering mouth with a tissue while sneezing, clean room background, natural lighting, no text, no watermark

items.summary: 多吃水果，补充维生素，身体更有力。
items.image_prompt: Realistic photo of fresh colorful fruits on a plate, child reaching for an apple, natural lighting, no text, no watermark

items.summary: 玩完玩具放回原位，房间整整齐齐。
items.image_prompt: Realistic photo of a child putting toys into a storage box in a tidy room, natural lighting, no text, no watermark

items.summary: 天冷穿外套，热了脱衣服，保护自己不感冒。
items.image_prompt: Realistic photo of a child putting on a warm jacket by the door, autumn weather outside, natural lighting, no text, no watermark
